{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303500508743847BB9AEAEB0655"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598594706553029438","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉还挺好看的，尤其是三次寿命，挺好设定，这样就会让玩家更为尊重游戏，包括崇祯献祭一半生命，也让他更重视玩家，不错，继续努力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769188373,"group_id":"7583605516379622462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2gACKCl3ylXxzZneQ5QRKdp/bBvalruoozezewoM4/8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2200556836756851","user_name":"炼器殿的黎人龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2200556836756851","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583605516379622462","book_info":{"abstract":"【明末历史】+【第四天灾】+【群像】+【全球争霸】
崇祯上吊前一刻，觉醒了“文明火种系统”。
朕的大明，朕来救！但……朕的救兵画风不太对。

“陛下！建奴叩关，流寇四起，国库能跑老鼠了！”
崇祯：“莫慌，待朕摇人。”
下一秒，百万“第四天灾”玩家大军，响应召唤，从天而降。

他们管朕叫“新手村村长”。
他们用“基建狂魔”的速度，三天修好北京棱堡。
他们用“物理说服”的方式，把红夷大炮改成了火箭炮。
他们甚至想给朕搞“君主立宪”？
李自成大军压境，玩家们哈哈大笑：“副本BOSS来了，兄弟们刷他！”
满清铁骑南下，玩家们两眼放光：“史诗任务！守国门，爆装备！”
东林党人还在打嘴炮，玩家们的“天策商会”已经垄断了全国经济。

朕看着这群不死不灭、骚操作不断的“天兵”，陷入沉思。
说好是来帮朕挽天倾的，可他们好像……想把天都给换了？

然而，系统冰冷的提示音始终在耳：【文明存续倒计时：五年。】
五年内，若不能带领华夏点燃工业之火，屹立于世界之巅。
眼前的一切辉煌，连同整个文明，都将被历史长河彻底抹去。
但，这一切的背后，那双来自未来、注视着我们的眼睛，究竟是谁？

问：如果给你五年，你能改变一个文明的命运吗？
答：我们能。因为，我们即是火种。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7244fc67f2789d7d9a1ba4b9a6992fdf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"骏马腾宇","author_id":"","book_id":"7583605516379622462","book_name":"大明，崇祯召唤玩家续命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#506070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1085人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584312086822388248","read_count":"1085","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"407534"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"150","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,明朝,系统,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/731e6ff054b2be468254f618de52b9c3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393006&x-signature=rXvyWVu36ibNYdd9WpWpO%2FGkzv8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2063133954281608","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303500508743847BB9AEAEB0655"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":873},"user_action":{"author":0,
